text:
In the heart of an enchanted forest, there lived a peculiar little creature named Blitzie. Blitzie was orange with curly dark hair, and she wore goggles around her tiny neck. She was known around the forest for her love of bubbles. Every morning, she'd emerge from her cozy burrow, stretch her tiny orange legs, and bounce through the dewy grass to blow bubbles.

One dewy morning, while bouncing on a particular green lily pad, Blitzie heard a funny rustling noise. She squinted into the thicket and saw a rabbit with oversized ears hop towards her.

"Hello! Hi there!" she squeaked cheerily.

The rabbit paused, tilting his head with one ear.

"Hello. Who are you?" he queried.

"Oh, I'm Blitzie! The Bubble Babbie!" she declared proudly.

"Aren't you ever just a teensie bit scared?"

Blitzie giggled. "Not at all! Scared
